const hits = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search opinions|search.*court|docket/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(hits);

const t = ALL_TOOLS.find(x=>x.name==="mcp__courtlistener__search"); if(!t){text("missing");exit();} const fn=tools.mcp__courtlistener__search; const r=await fn({type:"o",q:"\"Morgan v. Sundance\" arbitration waiver mandamus",filed_before:"2026-07-10",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","absolute_url","snippet"],num_results:5}); for(const c of (r.content||[])){if(c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if(c.type==="image") image(c);}
